texto: Education either functions as an instrument which is used to facilitate integration of the younger generation into the logic of the present system and bring about conformity or it becomes the practice of freedom, the means by which men and women deal critically and creatively with reality and discover how to participate in the transformation of their world.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Shaull sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Education either functions as an instrument which is used to facilitate integration of the younge…” articula educacao, education, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
